title: streptocaulon cochinchinense
intro: Streptocaulon cochinchinense, also known as the Vietnamese coral plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Streptocaulon cochinchinense include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various infections, such as respiratory and urinary tract infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are typically consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
